languages.text:
Пропадет после первого срабатывания в космобою.
When destroying an enemy ship, restores the most damaged shield sector to maximum and gains +2 movement points for the current turn.На первый космобой (потом пропадает).
When destroying an enemy ship, restores the most damaged shield sector to maximum and gains +2 movement points for the current turn.

traits.locale_text:
Пропадет после первого срабатывания в космобою.
When destroying an enemy ship, restores the most damaged shield sector to maximum and gains +2 movement points for the current turn.На первый космобой (потом пропадает).
When destroying an enemy ship, restores the most damaged shield sector to maximum and gains +2 movement points for the current turn.

languages.text: When an enemy voidship is destroyed for the first time in combat, the flagship recovers its most damaged {g|Encyclopedia:ShieldSectorSpace}shield sector{/g} and gains +2 {g|Encyclopedia:MovementPointsSpace}VMP{/g} for the current turn.
languages.original_text:
Пропадет после первого срабатывания в космобою.
When destroying an enemy ship, restores the most damaged shield sector to maximum and gains +2 movement points for the current turn.На первый космобой (потом пропадает).
When destroying an enemy ship, restores the most damaged shield sector to maximum and gains +2 movement points for the current turn.

traits.locale_text: This effect is removed after the first activation in combat. Whenever an enemy voidship is destroyed, the flagship gets its most damaged shield sector recovered and gains +2 MP for the current turn.

When an enemy voidship is destroyed for the first time in combat, the flagship recovers its most damaged {g|Encyclopedia:ShieldSectorSpace}shield sector{/g} and gains +2 {g|Encyclopedia:MovementPointsSpace}VMP{/g} for the current turn.

When an enemy voidship is destroyed for the first time in combat, the flagship recovers its most damaged g|Encyclopedia:ShieldSectorSpace}shield sector{/g} and gains +2 {g|Encyclopedia:MovementPointsSpace}VMP{/g} for the current turn.

languages.text: Когда в бою впервые уничтожен вражеский пустотный корабль, флагман полностью восстанавливает заряд щита самого поврежденного {g|Encyclopedia:ShieldSectorSpace}сектора{/g} и получает +2 {g|Encyclopedia:MovementPointsSpace}ОПП{/g} в текущем ходу.
languages.original_text: When an enemy voidship is destroyed for the first time in combat, the flagship recovers its most damaged {g|Encyclopedia:ShieldSectorSpace}shield sector{/g} and gains +2 {g|Encyclopedia:MovementPointsSpace}VMP{/g} for the current turn.

traits.locale_text: Когда в бою впервые уничтожен вражеский пустотный корабль, флагман полностью восстанавливает заряд щита самого поврежденного сектора и получает +2 {g|Encyclopedia:MovementPointsSpace}ОПП{/g} в текущем ходу.

Когда в бою впервые уничтожен вражеский пустотный корабль, флагман полностью восстанавливает заряд щита самого поврежденного сектора и получает +2 {g|Encyclopedia:MovementPointsSpace}ОПП{/g} в текущем ходу.

languages.text: Wird ein feindliches Raumschiff im Kampf erstmals zerstört, repariert das Flaggschiff den ab schwersten beschädigten {g|Encyclopedia:ShieldSectorSpace}Schildsektor{/g} und erhält für den aktuellen Zug +2 {g|Encyclopedia:MovementPointsSpace}LBP{/g}.
languages.original_text: When an enemy voidship is destroyed for the first time in combat, the flagship recovers its most damaged {g|Encyclopedia:ShieldSectorSpace}shield sector{/g} and gains +2 {g|Encyclopedia:MovementPointsSpace}VMP{/g} for the current turn.

traits.locale_text: Wird ein feindliches Raumschiff im Kampf erstmals zerstört, repariert das Flaggschiff den ab schwersten beschädigten {g|Encyclopedia:ShieldSectorSpace}Schildsektor{/g} und erhält für den aktuellen Zug +2 {g|Encyclopedia:MovementPointsSpace}LBP{/g}.

languages.text: La primera vez que destruyes una nave del vacío enemiga en un combate, la nave insignia recupera su {g|Encyclopedia:ShieldSectorSpace}sector de escudo{/g} más dañado y obtiene +2 {g|Encyclopedia:MovementPointsSpace}PMV{/g} en el turno actual.
languages.original_text: When an enemy voidship is destroyed for the first time in combat, the flagship recovers its most damaged {g|Encyclopedia:ShieldSectorSpace}shield sector{/g} and gains +2 {g|Encyclopedia:MovementPointsSpace}VMP{/g} for the current turn.

traits.locale_text: La primera vez que destruyes una nave del vacío enemiga en un combate, la nave insignia recupera su {g|Encyclopedia:ShieldSectorSpace}sector de escudo{/g} más dañado y obtiene +2 {g|Encyclopedia:MovementPointsSpace}PMV{/g} en el turno actual.

languages.text: Çatışmada ilk kez bir düşman uçsuz gemisi imha edildiğinde sancak gemisi, en çok hasar görmüş {g|Encyclopedia:ShieldSectorSpace}kalkan sektörünü{/g} onarır ve mevcut turda +2 {g|Encyclopedia:MovementPointsSpace}UHP{/g} kazanır.
languages.original_text: When an enemy voidship is destroyed for the first time in combat, the flagship recovers its most damaged {g|Encyclopedia:ShieldSectorSpace}shield sector{/g} and gains +2 {g|Encyclopedia:MovementPointsSpace}VMP{/g} for the current turn.

traits.locale_text: Çatışmada ilk kez bir düşman uçsuz gemisi imha edildiğinde sancak gemisi, en çok hasar görmüş kalkan sektörünü onarır ve mevcut turda +2 {g|Encyclopedia:MovementPointsSpace}UHP{/g} kazanır.

languages.text: 战斗中首次摧毁敌方虚空舰时，旗舰将修复受损最严重的{g|Encyclopedia:ShieldSectorSpace}护盾区域{/g}，并在当前回合获得2点{g|Encyclopedia:MovementPointsSpace}移动点数{/g}。
languages.original_text: When an enemy voidship is destroyed for the first time in combat, the flagship recovers its most damaged {g|Encyclopedia:ShieldSectorSpace}shield sector{/g} and gains +2 {g|Encyclopedia:MovementPointsSpace}VMP{/g} for the current turn.

traits.locale_text: 战斗中首次摧毁敌方虚空舰时，旗舰将修复受损最严重的{g|Encyclopedia:ShieldSectorSpace}护盾区域{/g}，并在当前回合获得2点{g|Encyclopedia:MovementPointsSpace}移动点数{/g}。

languages.text: Lorsque le vaisseau spatial d'un ennemi est détruit pour la première fois au combat, le vaisseau amiral répare son {g|Encyclopedia:ShieldSectorSpace}secteur de bouclier{/g} le plus endommagé et gagne +2 {g|Encyclopedia:MovementPointsSpace}PDV{/g} pendant le tour en cours.
languages.original_text: When an enemy voidship is destroyed for the first time in combat, the flagship recovers its most damaged {g|Encyclopedia:ShieldSectorSpace}shield sector{/g} and gains +2 {g|Encyclopedia:MovementPointsSpace}VMP{/g} for the current turn.

traits.locale_text: Lorsque le vaisseau spatial d'un ennemi est détruit pour la première fois au combat, le vaisseau amiral répare son {g|Encyclopedia:ShieldSectorSpace}secteur de bouclier{/g} le plus endommagé et gagne +2 {g|Encyclopedia:MovementPointsSpace}PDV{/g} pendant le tour en cours.

languages.text: 敵空母が戦闘で初めて撃破されると、旗艦は最もダメージを受けていた{g|Encyclopedia:ShieldSectorSpace}シールドセクター{/g}を回復し、現在のターンに+2{g|Encyclopedia:MovementPointsSpace}VMP{/g}を得る。
languages.original_text: When an enemy voidship is destroyed for the first time in combat, the flagship recovers its most damaged g|Encyclopedia:ShieldSectorSpace}shield sector{/g} and gains +2 {g|Encyclopedia:MovementPointsSpace}VMP{/g} for the current turn.

traits.locale_text: 敵空母が戦闘で初めて撃破されると、旗艦は最もダメージを受けていた{g|Encyclopedia:ShieldSectorSpace}シールドセクター{/g}を回復し、現在のターンに+2{g|Encyclopedia:MovementPointsSpace}VMP{/g}を得る。
